Tests the behavior of Math.atan when given NaN as input.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan` function when it receives `NaN` as an input. The script uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.atan(NaN)` is `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This test ensures that the `Math.atan` function correctly handles `NaN` inputs, which is important for maintaining mathematical accuracy in applications that use this function. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific test case.
